title: LicenseReceipt
description: Record written by tool-wallet when a Polygon USDC payment is confirmed. One file per transaction, stored at {FS_ENDPOINT}/vault/source/license-receipts/{YYYY}/{MM}/{tx_hash}.json.

product_id.description: Identifier for the purchased product (e.g. os-privategit).

license_tier.description: License tier purchased. apache = Apache 2.0 open-source tier; fsl = Functional Source License commercial tier.

version.description: Semver version string of the binary at the time of purchase (e.g. 0.1.2).

customer_ref.description: Polygon wallet address of the paying customer (0x-prefixed, checksummed or lowercase).

price_usdc.description: Amount paid in USDC micro-units. 1 USDC = 1,000,000. Example: 9900000 = 9.90 USDC.

tx_hash.description: Polygon transaction hash of the confirmed USDC transfer (0x followed by 64 hex characters).

chain.description: Blockchain network. v1 supports Polygon PoS only.

confirmed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of block confirmation (e.g. 2026-06-14T18:30:00Z).

block_number.description: Polygon block number at which the payment was confirmed.

license_key.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 license token. Format: base64url(sig[64] || JSON_payload_bytes). Verified by app-privategit-source.
